records.m_Talk_ENG: The air is cold, and my body feels heavy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The air is cold, and my body feels heavy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The air is cold, and my body feels heavy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tired enough. And yes, afraid enough, too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tired enough. And yes, afraid enough, too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tired enough. And yes, afraid enough, too.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
But because of that
8v my mind is clearer than ever.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
But because of that
8v my mind is clearer than ever.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
But because of that
8v my mind is clearer than ever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeonhwa's soul must've been trapped in this bleak, colorless place for a long, long time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeonhwa's soul must've been trapped in this bleak, colorless place for a long, long time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeonhwa's soul must've been trapped in this bleak, colorless place for a long, long time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Until your inky black claws stained every corner of her spirit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Until your inky black claws stained every corner of her spirit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Until your inky black claws stained every corner of her spirit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Life is but a fleeting moment. Death is eternal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Life is but a fleeting moment. Death is eternal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Life is but a fleeting moment. Death is eternal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So what harm is there in choosing eternity over the fleeting?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So what harm is there in choosing eternity over the fleeting?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So what harm is there in choosing eternity over the fleeting?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You devoured humans, and you seemed to have swallowed their shamelessness too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You devoured humans, and you seemed to have swallowed their shamelessness too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You devoured humans, and you seemed to have swallowed their shamelessness too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How long will you hide in the shadows, spouting hollow nonsense?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How long will you hide in the shadows, spouting hollow nonsense?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How long will you hide in the shadows, spouting hollow nonsense?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can see it now. That life of yours is hanging by a breath.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can see it now. That life of yours is hanging by a breath.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can see it now. That life of yours is hanging by a breath.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One more use of the blood-born power, and you'll die.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One more use of the blood-born power, and you'll die.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One more use of the blood-born power, and you'll die.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you came here intending to trade your life for mine? Bold of you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you came here intending to trade your life for mine? Bold of you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you came here intending to trade your life for mine? Bold of you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though that pitiful life won't be nearly enough to weigh down this body.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though that pitiful life won't be nearly enough to weigh down this body.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though that pitiful life won't be nearly enough to weigh down this body.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The fangs are already bared, yet you keep wagging your tongue. What a waste.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The fangs are already bared, yet you keep wagging your tongue. What a waste.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The fangs are already bared, yet you keep wagging your tongue. What a waste.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's end this. Right here and now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's end this. Right here and now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's end this. Right here and now.
